name: 命名风格转换
description: 变量/函数/文件名在 camelCase / PascalCase / snake_case / kebab-case / UPPER_CASE 之间互转
author: SmartBox

commands.label: 转 camelCase
commands.description: 转换为驼峰式命名: helloWorld

commands.label: 转 PascalCase
commands.description: 转换为大驼峰命名: HelloWorld

commands.label: 转 snake_case
commands.description: 转换为下划线命名: hello_world

commands.label: 转 kebab-case
commands.description: 转换为连字符命名: hello-world
